name: Butter Flavored Crisco Ultimate Chocolate Chip Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter flavored Crisco, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg.
4. Gradually blend in the flour, salt, and baking soda into the creamed mixture.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips and pecan pieces.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (about 2 tablespoons) of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
7. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until chewy and lightly browned. Do not overbake; if desired, bake for 11 to 13 minutes for crispier cookies.
8. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring them to a cooling rack.
9. Yield: Approximately 3 dozen 3-inch cookies.
Note: If pecans are omitted, use 1-1/2 cups semi-sweet chocolate chips.
